issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (DON!! cards on field), not 'HasRestingDon' (resting DON!!). The card text says 'DON!! cards on your field' which refers to attached DON!!, not resting DON!!.
Condition should use 'maxCount':3 or 'upTo':3 to represent '3 or less', not 'count':3 which typically means 'exactly 3'.

Action is incomplete. GiveDon adds DON!! to hand/field, but the card text specifies 'add up to 2 DON!! cards from your DON!! deck and rest them'. Should specify: source (from deck), count (up to 2), and resting state. Likely needs additional Rest action or Rest parameter.
